title: Generating Constructive Solid Geometry Instead of Meshes by Fine-Tuning a Code-Generation LLM
abstract: Introduces a novel approach for 3D geometry generation that produces surface-based CSG by leveraging a code-generation LLM. Creates a dataset of CSG programs and fine-tunes a code LLM to generate CSG code from 3D inputs.
method_summary: Fine-tunes a code-generation LLM to output CSG programs instead of meshes, bridging LLM code generation with constructive solid geometry.

title: DiffCSG: Differentiable CSG via Rasterization
abstract: Proposes differentiable rendering for CSG primitives via rasterization, enabling gradient-based optimization of CSG scene parameters including shape, materials, and lighting.
method_summary: Differentiable rasterization-based renderer for CSG primitives enabling inverse rendering and machine learning optimization of CSG scenes.

title: Learning Efficient Surface Representations for 3D Solids
abstract: Proposes efficient surface representations for B-Rep solids defined with NURBS surfaces, moving beyond UV-grid approximation to more compact and accurate representations.
method_summary: Novel surface representation learning for B-Rep/NURBS solids that improves upon standard UV-grid sampling approaches.

title: NeurCADRecon: Neural Representation for Reconstructing CAD Surfaces by Enforcing Zero Gaussian Curvature
abstract: Self-supervised neural SDF approach for CAD surface reconstruction from unoriented point clouds, using a developability term to encourage zero Gaussian curvature for piecewise developable surfaces.
method_summary: Self-supervised neural SDF with zero Gaussian curvature regularization for high-fidelity CAD surface reconstruction from point clouds.

title: P2CADNet: An End-to-End Network to Reconstruct Featured CAD Model from Point Cloud
abstract: Proposes P2CADNet, the first end-to-end network for reconstructing featured CAD models from point clouds, combining point cloud feature extraction with CAD primitive prediction.
method_summary: End-to-end network combining point cloud feature extraction with direct CAD model reconstruction including sketch and extrusion primitives.

title: ContrastCAD: Contrastive Learning-based Representation Learning for Computer-Aided Design Models
abstract: Proposes ContrastCAD, a contrastive learning approach for CAD representation learning that captures semantic information within construction sequences using dropout-based augmentation and Random Replace and Extrude.
method_summary: Contrastive learning framework for CAD sequence representation with novel augmentation strategies (dropout, RRE) for self-supervised CAD understanding.

title: CAD-Editor: A Locate-then-Infill Framework with Automated Training Data Synthesis for Text-Based CAD Editing
abstract: Proposes a locate-then-infill framework for text-based CAD editing that decomposes editing into locating regions requiring modification and infilling with new geometry, with automated training data synthesis.
method_summary: Two-stage locate-then-infill framework for text-based CAD editing with automated data synthesis using design variation models and LVLMs.

title: neuralCAD-Edit: An Expert Benchmark for Multimodal-Instructed 3D CAD Model Editing
abstract: Presents a benchmark of 192 multimodal editing requests for 3D CAD models, collected from professional designers interacting with CAD software while providing video and verbal instructions.
method_summary: Expert-curated benchmark for multimodal CAD editing with video+verbal instructions from professional designers, assessing AI editing capabilities.

title: PR-CAD: Progressive Refinement for Unified Controllable and Faithful Text-to-CAD Generation with Large Language Models
abstract: Proposes PR-CAD, a progressive refinement framework that unifies generation and editing for controllable and faithful text-to-CAD modeling with high-fidelity interaction data.
method_summary: Progressive refinement framework unifying text-to-CAD generation and editing via LLMs with curated high-fidelity interaction dataset.

title: Learning Hierarchical and Geometry-Aware Graph Representations for Text-to-CAD
abstract: Proposes a hierarchical and geometry-aware graph as intermediate representation for text-to-CAD, modeling multi-level parts as nodes with explicit geometric constraints to make long-horizon generation more robust.
method_summary: Graph-based intermediate representation for text-to-CAD that decomposes complex assemblies into hierarchical nodes with geometric constraints.

title: CADSmith: Multi-Agent CAD Generation with Programmatic Geometric Validation
abstract: Presents CADSmith, a multi-agent pipeline that generates CadQuery code from natural language with iterative refinement through nested correction loops: inner loop for syntax/execution errors and outer loop for geometric validation.
method_summary: Multi-agent pipeline with nested correction loops (syntax + geometric validation) for text-to-CadQuery code generation.

title: Proc3D: Procedural 3D Generation and Parametric Editing of 3D Shapes with Large Language Models
abstract: Facilitates generation of editable 3D models and relative parameters from LLMs using Procedural Compact Graph (PCG) representation, providing efficient and compact procedural modeling.
method_summary: LLM-based procedural 3D generation using Procedural Compact Graph representation for parametric editing of shapes.

title: Physically Grounded 3D Shape Generation for Industrial Design
abstract: Proposes a unified physics-based 3D shape generation pipeline for industrial design, introducing a flow matching model with explicit physical constraints for generating shapes that satisfy engineering requirements.
method_summary: Flow matching model with physics constraints for generating industrially realistic 3D shapes satisfying engineering design requirements.

title: BrepGaussian: CAD Reconstruction from Multi-View Images with Gaussian Splatting
abstract: Proposes BrepGaussian, a framework that learns 3D parametric B-Rep representations from 2D images using Gaussian Splatting renderer with learnable features for CAD reconstruction.
method_summary: Gaussian Splatting-based framework for recovering B-Rep CAD models from multi-view images via learnable parametric features.

title: Error Notebook-Guided, Training-Free Part Retrieval in 3D CAD Assemblies via Vision-Language Models
abstract: Training-free framework using Error Notebooks and RAG to guide VLMs for specification-aware part retrieval in CAD assemblies, achieving +23.4% accuracy on human-preference metrics.
method_summary: Error Notebook + RAG framework for training-free VLM-guided part retrieval in CAD assemblies with grammar-constraint verification.

title: CME-CAD: Heterogeneous Collaborative Multi-Expert Reinforcement Learning for CAD Code Generation
abstract: Proposes CME-CAD, a heterogeneous collaborative multi-expert RL paradigm that integrates diverse expert agents for CAD code generation, with CADExpert benchmark of 17,299 instances.
method_summary: Multi-expert RL paradigm integrating heterogeneous agents (different architectures/training) for collaborative CAD code generation.

title: DiffCAD: Weakly-Supervised Probabilistic CAD Model Retrieval and Alignment from an RGB Image
abstract: First weakly-supervised probabilistic approach to CAD retrieval and alignment from RGB images using diffusion models, trained on synthetic data with high accuracy on real datasets.
method_summary: Diffusion-based probabilistic model for weakly-supervised CAD retrieval and 9-DoF alignment from single RGB images.

title: mrCAD: Multimodal Refinement of Computer-aided Designs
abstract: Presents mrCAD, a dataset of multimodal instructions in a communication game for CAD refinement, analyzing how humans and machines perform edits differently.
method_summary: Multimodal communication game dataset for CAD refinement, benchmarking VLMs on iterative design modification from drawing+text instructions.

title: CAD-Coder (MIT): Text-Guided CAD Files Code Generation
abstract: Framework that transforms natural language instructions into CAD script codes executable in Python environments to generate human-usable CAD files.
method_summary: Text-to-CAD-code framework generating executable Python CAD scripts from natural language with iterative refinement.

title: BRepLer: Language-guided Editing of CAD Models
abstract: Addresses language-guided CAD editing by bridging the semantic gap between user commands and underlying shape geometry, tackling the shortage of paired language-CAD editing data.
method_summary: Language-guided B-Rep editing framework connecting natural language commands to geometric operations on CAD models.

title: Pointer-CAD: Unifying B-Rep and Command Sequences via Pointer-based Edges and Faces Selection
abstract: Unifies B-Rep and command sequence representations via pointer-based entity selection, enabling complex editing operations like fillet and chamfer that require explicit face/edge selection.
method_summary: Pointer-based mechanism unifying B-Rep topology with command sequences, enabling entity selection for advanced CAD operations.

title: Topology-First B-Rep Meshing
abstract: Proposes a topology-first approach to B-Rep meshing that preserves patch boundaries across complex models, ensuring topological consistency in the meshing process.
method_summary: Topology-preserving meshing algorithm for B-Rep models that maintains face boundary integrity across complex geometries.

title: Fine-Tuning Code Language Models for Text-Driven Sequential CAD Design
abstract: Fine-tunes code-LLMs to generate CAD sequences in JSON-based format from natural language descriptions, demonstrating viability of code LLMs for sequential CAD design.
method_summary: Code-LLM fine-tuning for text-to-CAD-sequence generation using JSON-based CAD representation format.

title: CMT: A Cascade MAR with Topology Predictor for Multimodal Conditional CAD Generation
abstract: Proposes cascade Masked Autoregressive model with topology predictor for multimodal conditional B-Rep CAD generation, capturing edge-counters-surface priors essential in B-Reps.
method_summary: Cascade masked autoregressive model with explicit topology prediction for multimodal conditional B-Rep generation.

title: GeoCAD: Local Geometry-Controllable CAD Generation with Large Language Models
abstract: Addresses local geometry-controllable CAD generation that modifies local parts of CAD models automatically using LLMs, enhancing design efficiency for targeted modifications.
method_summary: LLM-based local geometry control for CAD generation enabling targeted part modification while preserving global structure.

title: GenPara: Enhancing 3D Design Editing by Inferring Users' Regions of Interest with Text-Conditional Shape Parameters
abstract: Interactive 3D design editing system leveraging text-conditional shape parameters of part-aware 3D designs, visualizing design space within an Exploration Panel.
method_summary: Text-conditional shape parameter inference for interactive 3D CAD editing with region-of-interest detection.

title: Self-Supervised Representation Learning for CAD
abstract: Proposes self-supervised representation learning methods specifically designed for CAD models, learning useful features without labeled data for downstream CAD tasks.
method_summary: Self-supervised pre-training framework for learning CAD model representations applicable to classification and retrieval tasks.

title: Pushing Auto-regressive Models for 3D Shape Generation at Capacity and Scalability
abstract: Investigates scaling autoregressive models for 3D shape generation, pushing capacity and scalability limits for generating complex 3D geometries.
method_summary: Scaled autoregressive transformer for 3D shape generation with improved capacity through architectural innovations.

title: Multi-View to CAD: Creating CAD Models from Multi-View Images
abstract: Generation of CAD models from multi-view images, solving the problem typically addressed with intermediate point-cloud reconstruction by direct multi-view to CAD conversion.
method_summary: Direct multi-view image to CAD model generation bypassing intermediate point cloud reconstruction.

title: AutoConstrain: Aligning Constraint Generation with Design Intent in Parametric CAD
abstract: Adapts alignment techniques from reasoning LLMs to generate engineering sketch constraints in CAD models, ensuring constraints capture design intent without over-constraining or distorting geometry.
method_summary: LLM alignment techniques applied to CAD constraint generation, ensuring design intent preservation in parametric sketches.

title: DAVINCI: A Single-Stage Architecture for Constrained CAD Sketch Inference
abstract: Unified architecture for single-stage CAD sketch parameterization and constraint inference from raster images, jointly learning both outputs to minimize error accumulation.
method_summary: Single-stage transformer for joint CAD sketch parameterization and constraint inference from raster images with contrastive pre-training.

title: Shaping Realities: Enhancing 3D Generative AI with Fabrication Constraints
abstract: Enhances 3D generative AI with physical fabrication constraints, encoding physical properties as constraints during generation to ensure manufactured functionality.
method_summary: Fabrication-aware 3D generation framework encoding physical constraints (stability, printability) into generative models.

title: Robust Self-Supervised CAD Reconstruction from Three Orthographic Views Using 3D Gaussian Splatting
abstract: Self-supervised CAD reconstruction from three orthographic views using 3D Gaussian Splatting, transforming CAD sketches into natural-image-like representations for robust reconstruction.
method_summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting-based self-supervised approach for CAD reconstruction from orthographic engineering drawings.

title: 3Dify: A Framework for Procedural 3D-CG Generation Assisted by LLMs Using MCP and RAG
abstract: Procedural 3D-CG generation framework using LLMs with Model Context Protocol and RAG, enabling users to generate 3D content through natural language.
method_summary: LLM-based procedural 3D generation framework leveraging MCP and RAG for natural language to 3D-CG content creation.

title: LLM Agents for Structured, Textured and Interactive 3D Modeling
abstract: LLM agents hierarchically parse user input to initialize procedural modeling, then iteratively refine to produce structured, textured, and interactive 3D assets.
method_summary: Hierarchical LLM agent system for structured 3D modeling with iterative procedural refinement and texture generation.

title: CADgpt: Harnessing Natural Language Processing for 3D Modelling to Enhance CAD Workflows
abstract: Introduces CADgpt, a plugin integrating NLP with Rhino3D for enhancing 3D modelling in CAD environments through natural language interaction.
method_summary: NLP-integrated Rhino3D plugin enabling natural language-driven 3D CAD modeling within existing CAD software.

title: Parametric Primitive Analysis of CAD Sketches with Vision Transformer
abstract: Framework using vision transformer for parametric primitive analysis of CAD sketches, transforming sketch analysis into a set prediction problem for primitives and constraints.
method_summary: Vision transformer-based set prediction framework for joint CAD sketch primitive detection and constraint inference.

title: Learning B-Rep in Graph Structure for Efficient CAD Generation
abstract: Proposes learning B-Rep representations in graph structure for efficient CAD generation, leveraging graph neural networks for topology-aware B-Rep modeling.
method_summary: Graph-structured B-Rep learning framework for efficient CAD generation with topology-aware graph neural networks.

title: Transformer-Based B-rep Geometric Feature Recognition
abstract: Transformer architecture for B-rep geometric feature recognition, incorporating edge and topology feature biases to reinforce geometric constraints on each face.
method_summary: Transformer with edge/topology feature biases for B-Rep geometric feature recognition in CAD models.

title: Fast Curvature Regularization of Neural SDFs for CAD Models
abstract: Proposes fast Gaussian curvature regularization for neural SDFs targeting CAD models, avoiding full Hessian computation while enforcing developable surface properties.
method_summary: Efficient curvature regularization for neural SDF-based CAD reconstruction without expensive full Hessian computation.

title: Zero-shot CAD Program Re-Parameterization for Interactive Manipulation
abstract: Zero-shot approach for re-parameterizing CAD programs to enable interactive manipulation, allowing users to modify CAD models through intuitive geometric handles.
method_summary: Zero-shot CAD program re-parameterization enabling interactive geometric manipulation without retraining.

title: Differentiable 3D CAD Programs for Bidirectional Editing
abstract: Makes CAD programs differentiable to enable bidirectional editing, where changes to geometry propagate back to program parameters and vice versa.
method_summary: Differentiable CAD program representation enabling bidirectional editing between geometric shapes and parametric programs.

title: ParSEL: Parameterized Shape Editing with Language
abstract: Given a segmented 3D mesh and editing request, ParSEL produces a parameterized editing program allowing users to explore shape variations with precise control.
method_summary: Language-driven parameterized shape editing producing adjustable editing programs for 3D mesh manipulation.

title: Neural Halfspace Representation: Implicit Conversion of Manifold B-Rep Solids
abstract: Proposes efficient algorithm to extract Boolean trees from manifold B-Rep solids and neural network optimization for computing implicit functions.
method_summary: Neural halfspace representation for implicit conversion of B-Rep solids via Boolean tree extraction and neural optimization.

title: ProcGen3D: Learning Neural Procedural Graph Representations for Image-to-3D Reconstruction
abstract: Introduces ProcGen3D for 3D content creation by generating procedural graph abstractions of 3D objects, which can be decoded into rich, complex 3D assets.
method_summary: Neural procedural graph generation for image-to-3D reconstruction producing editable procedural representations.

title: Learning 3D Representations from Procedural 3D Programs
abstract: Proposes learning 3D representations from procedural 3D programs that automatically generate shapes using simple primitives and augmentations.
method_summary: Self-supervised 3D representation learning from procedurally generated shapes using primitive-based programs.

title: Position: You Can't Manufacture a NeRF
abstract: Examines the manufacturability gap in 3D generative models, identifying that complex AI-generated 3D objects lack mass-manufacturable form and simple generated CAD objects are not realistic.
method_summary: Position paper analyzing the manufacturability gap between neural 3D representations and CAD-ready manufacturing formats.

title: 3D-GPT: Procedural 3D Modeling with Large Language Models
abstract: Positions LLMs as proficient problem solvers for procedural 3D modeling, dissecting tasks into segments and appointing agents for each task with three core agents.
method_summary: Multi-agent LLM system for procedural 3D modeling with task decomposition and specialized agent assignment.

title: Engineering Sketch Generation for Computer-Aided Design
abstract: Addresses the problem of generating engineering sketches for CAD, proposing methods for sketch generation that capture the structured nature of engineering drawings.
method_summary: Generative model for engineering sketch synthesis capturing structured geometric primitives and constraints.

title: UV-Net: Learning from Boundary Representations
abstract: Introduces UV-Net, a neural network architecture designed to operate directly on B-rep data from 3D CAD models, learning useful representations for downstream tasks.
method_summary: Novel neural architecture operating directly on B-Rep UV-grid data for CAD model classification and retrieval.

title: Category-Level Multi-Part Multi-Joint 3D Shape Assembly
abstract: Addresses category-level multi-part multi-joint 3D shape assembly, learning to assemble complex articulated objects from individual parts.
method_summary: Category-level framework for assembling multi-part articulated 3D shapes with joint prediction.

title: Fusion 360 Gallery: A Dataset and Environment for Programmatic CAD Construction
abstract: Presents the Fusion 360 Gallery dataset of 8,625 human design sequences expressed in a simple sketch-and-extrude language for programmatic CAD construction.
method_summary: Benchmark dataset of human CAD design sequences with sketch-and-extrude operations for training and evaluating CAD generation models.
